---
title: llms.txt
description: Machine-readable documentation for LLMs.
---

# ShadSheet

> Headless React spreadsheet component library built with TanStack Table, HyperFormula, and shadcn conventions.

## Getting Started

- [Installation](/installation): Install and configure ShadSheet
- [Quick Start](/quick-start): Minimal working example
- [Concepts](/concepts): Architecture and data flow

## Components

- [Spreadsheet](/components/spreadsheet): Batteries-included spreadsheet component
- [SpreadsheetGrid](/components/spreadsheet-grid): Virtualized grid renderer
- [Toolbar](/components/toolbar): Formatting toolbar
- [FormulaBar](/components/formula-bar): Formula input bar
- [StatusBar](/components/status-bar): Row count and aggregates
- [ColumnHeaders](/components/column-headers): Header row with sorting/filtering

## Hooks

- [useSpreadsheetStore](/hooks/use-spreadsheet-store): Access Zustand store for spreadsheet state
- [useCellSelection](/hooks/use-cell-selection): Cell/range selection logic
- [useClipboard](/hooks/use-clipboard): Copy/cut/paste operations
- [useKeyboardNavigation](/hooks/use-keyboard-navigation): Arrow keys, Tab, Enter navigation
- [useHyperFormula](/hooks/use-hyperformula): Access formula engine instance
- [useMergeCells](/hooks/use-merge-cells): Cell merging operations

## Utilities

- [exportToCSV / exportToXLSX](/utils/export-utils): Data export functions
- [spreadsheetColumnFilterFn](/utils/filter-utils): Column filter logic
- [validateCellValue](/utils/validation-utils): Zod-based cell validation
- [parseCellAddress / formatCellAddress](/utils/cell-address): A1 notation utilities

## Guides

- [Headless Usage](/guides/headless-usage): Build custom UI with hooks + provider
- [Theming](/guides/theming): Tailwind CSS variables and dark mode
- [TypeScript](/guides/typescript): Type definitions and generics

## Optional

- [Advanced Customization](/guides/custom-layouts)
- [API Reference](/api-reference)
